initial_content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

pattern='src/(.*)\.ts$'
replacement='dist/$1.js'
echo "$pattern -> $replacement"
instruction: Make exactly these literal shell-string replacements and no regex redesign: "pattern='src/(.*)\\.ts$'" -> "pattern='packages/(.*)/src/(.*)\\.ts$'"; "replacement='dist/$1.js'" -> "replacement='packages/$1/dist/$2.js'".

replacement='packages/$1/dist/$2.js'
echo "$pattern -> $replacement"

set -euo pipefail

pattern='packages/(.*)/src/(.*)\.ts$'
